reviews.comment:
La dejadez se hace presente en esta estación de servicio . Una lastima pero no es recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Neglect is evident at this gas station. It's a shame, but it's not recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4572994797407490123/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNweVlYdU5nEAE

reviews.comment:
Aceptable para ser la YPF del primer pueblo del noroeste argentino. Haciendo patria. Restaría que sea una imponente para ilustrar a la Argentina dando la bienvenida. La atención muy coordial.

(Translated by Google)
Acceptable for the YPF station in the first town in Northwest Argentina. Doing its part for the country. It would be nice if it were a truly imposing station to represent Argentina and extend a welcoming presence. The service was very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4572994797407490123/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKNmJuRWxBRRAB

Excellent service, cleanliness and organization, very attentive staff! They accept credit and debit cards!

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención, cargue tanque lleno para cruzar la frontera y el auto me empezó a fallar, por la mala cálidas del combustible .no recomiendo cargar en este lugar

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. I filled up my tank to cross the border and my car started malfunctioning due to the poor quality of the fuel. I do not recommend filling up at this place.
